title: Flesh Droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Flesh Droid''' was the term used to refer to organic beings that were "converted" into [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]] by [[X0-X1]]. Much of their bodies contained mechanical parts but there were still some elements of an organic origin.

==Appearances==
*[[Crisis on Cloud City (adventure book)|''Crisis on Cloud City'']]

[[Category:Cyborgs]]
